---
title: "Research"
---

## Working Papers

**Brand Activism and Consumer Response**  
*Examining how political brand positioning affects consumer sentiment and purchasing behaviour using NLP-based analysis of social media data.*  
— In progress

**Influencer Marketing and Machine Learning**  
*Predicting influencer campaign effectiveness using multimodal features (text, image, engagement signals).*  
— In progress

**Causal NLP in Marketing**  
*Applying causal inference methods to text-based marketing data to move beyond predictive correlation.*  
— In progress

---

## Methods

I work primarily with:

- Large-scale text data (social media, reviews, brand communications)
- Transformer-based NLP models (BERT, sentence embeddings)
- Causal inference (instrumental variables, difference-in-differences)
- ML pipelines in Python (scikit-learn, PyTorch, HuggingFace)

---

## Interactive Demos

*ML research prototypes — coming soon via Hugging Face Spaces.*
